description_long: This apartment building features a modern, multi-block design with two main sections of varying heights, each rising up to six stories. The facade combines white and brown tones, with extensive use of large windows and glass balcony railings, providing a contemporary aesthetic. Green rooftop terraces and planters are visible, suggesting eco-friendly design elements. The building includes multiple balconies, some recessed and others protruding, adding depth and visual interest to the exterior. The ground level appears to have larger openings, likely for entrances or communal spaces, and the overall structure is rectilinear with clean lines. The rear and side views reveal additional balconies and a mix of vertical and horizontal window arrangements.
description: A modern, multi-section apartment building with white and brown facades, large windows, and green rooftop terraces. Features multiple balconies and a clean, rectilinear design.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing two main building blocks, multiple balconies, large windows, and rooftop greenery.
description_view_1: Narrow end view highlighting the depth of the building, rooftop terraces, and vertical window arrangements.
description_view_2: Opposite front and side view, similar to view 0 but from the other direction, showing more balconies and facade details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the alignment of balconies, window groupings, and the building's overall depth.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical and horizontal groupings, with some sections featuring symmetrical alignment and others staggered, creating a dynamic facade.
